description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can of beer with a pull tab on top, featuring a predominantly white background with bold blue and red graphic elements. The front displays a large blue ribbon graphic with ornate text and decorative flourishes, while the sides are adorned with additional text, logos, and a barcode. The can's surface is smooth and metallic, with printed graphics that include both English and Japanese writing. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull tab, and the bottom is slightly concave, typical of beverage cans. The overall design is clean and classic, with a focus on the blue ribbon motif and red diagonal accents.
description: A white aluminum beer can with blue and red ribbon-themed graphics, silver pull tab, and detailed printed text and logos.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the can with a partial blue ribbon graphic, red diagonal accents, and a vertical column of text in Japanese.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the can's side with a barcode, additional logos, and a partial view of the main blue ribbon graphic.
description_view_2: This view focuses on the back of the can, displaying the 'Blue Ribbon For A Reason' text, a large blue ribbon, and decorative elements.
description_view_3: This is the front view, featuring the prominent blue ribbon graphic, large text, and the number '16' below the ribbon.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold blue ribbon graphic with ornate text, red diagonal stripes, and decorative flourishes. The design uses a clean white background with blue and red accents, combining both English and Japanese typography in a classic, vintage style.
